cause_analysis.narrative: Touch Of Relaxation LLC churned on 2026-03-24 after 149 days with Zoca. Sentiment turned negative on 2026-01-29 (app_chat) — first complaint keyword: "not happy with". Classification: service complaint. Negative signals appeared but no explicit cancellation request.
recommendations: [Escalation] First negative sentiment on 2026-01-29 via app_chat. Triggering a same-day AM touchpoint on any negative keyword would have caught this.
[Sentiment] Add an automated sentiment alerting layer over app_chat/email that pages the AM when negative keywords appear.
